describe: Genuine routing ambiguity, the other axis from decision confidence: content that could extend an existing project or be its own new one. needsClarification true, asking which in plain words, not a guessed structure. Distinct from 04 (content itself too vague to act on) and 09 (which of two identically-named projects); this is 'does this belong to something that already exists.'
transcript: Thinking about redoing the backyard patio. New pavers, a fire pit, and some outdoor furniture. Need to get a few quotes first.

mockResponse.reasoning: Redoing the backyard patio could be more work under the existing Home Renovation project, or it could be its own project. Genuinely unclear which, so checking instead of guessing.
mockResponse.clarificationQuestion: Is the backyard patio redo part of Home Renovation, or its own project?
